sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 68.4g of fat. polyunsaturated fat is one of the better parts of the profile. for nuts, fat quality has to justify the calorie density.
sections.subtitleText: 68.4g of fat. polyunsaturated fat is one of the better parts of the profile. for nuts, fat quality has to justify the calorie density.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 13.1g of carbs. fibre is where things start to fall off. for a nut, fat quality matters a ton.
sections.subtitleText: 13.1g of carbs. fibre is where things start to fall off. for a nut, fat quality matters a ton.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 13.7g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. protein is support here, not the whole argument.
sections.subtitleText: 13.7g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. protein is support here, not the whole argument.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: everything else here is pretty flat.
sections.subtitleText: everything else here is pretty flat.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: magnesium at 63% daily value, zinc at 46% daily value, iron at 31% daily value stand out most. that gives this food real mineral support.
sections.subtitleText: magnesium at 63% daily value, zinc at 46% daily value, iron at 31% daily value stand out most. that gives this food real mineral support.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side: holds up as a better snack default than most packaged options because that real-world swap value counts. texture helps them feel satisfying because that can make moderation easier than with softer snack foods. still a recognisable whole-food option because that keeps them cleaner than most processed snacks.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side: good versions can get expensive because that affects how realistic frequent use is. calorie density is very high because that makes portion control a real issue. cost or allergy issues can limit use because practical downsides still count.

closing.summary: Pine Nuts has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best in small amounts where the fats and minerals matter more than sheer calories.
closing.useCaseNote: Best in small amounts where the fats and minerals matter more than sheer calories.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
